githubNote: CSS source files live in src/data/styles and are served via /api/styles. The API can be pointed at a GitHub raw URL by changing STYLES_SOURCE / the resolver in src/lib/styles.ts.

styles.name: Pulse Glow Button
styles.description: A call-to-action button with an expanding pulsing glow halo.

styles.name: Gradient Shift Button
styles.description: Button with a multi-color gradient that flows continuously.

styles.name: Neon Button
styles.description: Cyberpunk-style neon outline that floods with light on hover.

styles.name: 3D Press Button
styles.description: Chunky 3D button that physically depresses when clicked.

styles.name: Shine Sweep Button
styles.description: Dark button with a glossy light sweep on hover.

styles.name: Liquid Button
styles.description: Pill button with a liquid blob that expands behind it on hover.

styles.name: Spinner Loader
styles.description: Classic rotating ring loading indicator.

styles.name: Bouncing Dots Loader
styles.description: Three colored dots bouncing in sequence.

styles.name: Pulse Rings Loader
styles.description: Concentric rings expanding outward in a radar pulse.

styles.name: Bar Wave Loader
styles.description: Equalizer-style bars waving up and down.

styles.name: Orbit Loader
styles.description: Three colored dots orbiting a central point.

styles.name: Square Flip Loader
styles.description: A cube that flips through 3D space while shifting color.

styles.name: Gradient Text
styles.description: Bold text with an animated flowing gradient fill.

styles.name: Typewriter Text
styles.description: Text that types itself out with a blinking cursor.

styles.name: Glitch Text
styles.description: Digital glitch effect with RGB channel splitting.

styles.name: Wave Text
styles.description: Each letter bounces in a wave and shifts color.

styles.name: Neon Flicker Text
styles.description: Glowing neon sign text with a realistic flicker.

styles.name: Flip Card
styles.description: Card that rotates 180° in 3D to reveal its back on hover.

styles.name: Lift Glow Card
styles.description: Card lifts up with a colored glow on hover.
styles.html:
Hover Me
Lifts up with a glow

styles.name: Border Trace Card
styles.description: Card with a conic gradient border that rotates continuously.

styles.name: Shine Card
styles.description: Card with a diagonal light shine sweeping across on hover.

styles.name: Animated Gradient Background
styles.description: Smoothly shifting multi-color gradient background.

styles.name: Aurora Background
styles.description: Swirling aurora borealis effect with blurred color blobs.

styles.name: Floating Orbs Background
styles.description: Soft glowing orbs floating around a dark canvas.

styles.name: Grid Pulse Background
styles.description: Tech-style grid that pulses in brightness and color.

styles.name: Rainbow Border Button
styles.description: Button framed by a continuously rotating rainbow conic border.

styles.name: Slide Fill Button
styles.description: Outlined button whose background slides in from the left on hover.

styles.name: Underline Grow Button
styles.description: Text button with a gradient underline that grows across on hover.

styles.name: Skew Stretch Button
styles.description: Button that gently skews and stretches in a continuous wobble.

styles.name: Dual Ring Loader
styles.description: Two rings spinning in opposite directions, layered.

styles.name: Dot Circle Loader
styles.description: A ring of dots with a fading tail that chases itself around.

styles.name: Heartbeat Loader
styles.description: A beating heart that pulses with a lifelike rhythm.

styles.name: Dots Fade Loader
styles.description: A row of dots fading and scaling in a soft sequence.

styles.name: Shimmer Text
styles.description: Metallic text with a light sweep travelling across it.

styles.name: 3D Shadow Text
styles.description: Bold extruded text with layered shadows and a gentle float.

styles.name: Blur Reveal Text
styles.description: Text that drifts in and out of focus while letters tighten.

styles.name: Spotlight Card
styles.description: Dark card with a glowing spotlight that roams across its surface.

styles.name: 3D Tilt Card
styles.description: Card that tilts back in 3D perspective on hover.

styles.name: Morph Card
styles.description: Organic blob card whose border-radius morphs continuously.

styles.name: Matrix Rain Background
styles.description: Classic digital rain of glowing green streaks falling.

styles.name: Starfield Background
styles.description: Deep-space backdrop with twinkling stars at varied rhythms.

styles.name: Rain Drops Background
styles.description: Diagonal rain streaks scrolling down a stormy sky.

styles.name: Magnetic Button
styles.description: Pill button whose arrow icon slides forward on hover.

styles.name: Bounce Button
styles.description: Button that bounces gently up and down forever.

styles.name: Glow Ring Button
styles.description: White button surrounded by a rotating blurred rainbow glow.

styles.name: Wifi Loader
styles.description: Expanding wifi arcs pulsing outward like a connecting signal.

styles.name: Progress Bar Loader
styles.description: Indeterminate progress bar with a sliding gradient chunk.

styles.name: Rainbow Cycle Text
styles.description: Solid text cycling through the full rainbow over time.

styles.name: Fire Text
styles.description: Text with a flickering multi-layer fire glow underneath.

styles.name: Glassmorphism Card
styles.description: Frosted-glass card with blur, transparency and a soft border.

styles.name: Content Reveal Card
styles.description: Card whose overlay slides up to reveal caption on hover.

styles.name: Mesh Gradient Background
styles.description: Living mesh of overlapping color blobs that drift around.

styles.name: Falling Petals Background
styles.description: Soft pink petals spinning as they drift downward.

styles.name: Wave Background
styles.description: Two rolling wave layers swirling like ocean current.
